title: OR Stash
description: Improving your experience on Origin Realms with a wide range of quality of life additions
body:
# 🧩 OR Stash
**Improve your Origin Realms experience with OR Stash**

OR Stash offers many great features for Origin Realms both for your Quality of Life and general fixes that make the experience more enjoyable & consistent.

**Performance Optimizations** (as of 0.5.1)
![3.2x Performance improvement at spawn](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/05137783eb72536b2e3102804533f157185d7873.png)

We are not confining us to a specific scope if something seems like a good addition for the experience we might add it to the mod!

****

Here is a quick list of all the features: (as of 0.4.0)

**Items:** Price Lore, Price Per Item, Special Color Lore, Wardrobe Lore, Gesture Lore, Rocket HUD

**Chat:** Remove Indicator, Emoji Picker

**Visuals:** Align Backswag, Stash Icon

**Resources:** Server Pack Unlocker, Resource Order, Biome Music

**Notifications:** Visit Notifications, Party Ping

**Accessibility:** Block Picker, Big Sus Item, Settings Button, Navigator Button
